testcase.name: test_add_txt_record
testcase.failure:
self = <certbot_dns_infomaniak.dns_infomaniak_test.APIDomainTest testMethod=test_add_txt_record>
def test_add_txt_record(self): """add_txt_record with normal params should succeed""" > self._register_response( "/1/product?service_name=domain&customer_name={domain}".format(domain=DOMAIN), data=[ { "id": 654321, "account_id": 1234, "service_id": 14, "service_name": "domain", "customer_name": DOMAIN, } ], )
certbot_dns_infomaniak/dns_infomaniak_test.py:138: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ certbot_dns_infomaniak/dns_infomaniak_test.py:103: in _register_response self._mock_request(url, resp, method) _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = <certbot_dns_infomaniak.dns_infomaniak_test.APIDomainTest testMethod=test_add_txt_record> url = '/1/product?service_name=domain&customer_name=example.com' response = {'data': [{'account_id': 1234, 'customer_name': 'example.com', 'id': 654321, 'service_id': 14, ...}], 'result': 'success'} method = 'GET'
def _mock_request(self, url, response, method): """Mock the request using pycurl""" buffer = BytesIO() c = pycurl.Curl() c.setopt(c.URL, self.client.baseUrl + url) c.setopt(c.WRITEFUNCTION, buffer.write) c.setopt(c.HTTPHEADER, ['Authorization: Bearer ' + FAKE_TOKEN])
if method == 'POST': c.setopt(c.POSTFIELDS, response) c.setopt(c.CUSTOMREQUEST, 'POST') elif method == 'DELETE': c.setopt(c.CUSTOMREQUEST, 'DELETE')
> c.perform() E pycurl.error: (1, 'Protocol "mock" not supported')
certbot_dns_infomaniak/dns_infomaniak_test.py:129: error

testcase.name: test_add_txt_record_fail_to_authenticate
test_add_txt_record_fail_to_find_domain
test_del_txt_record
testcase.failure:
self = <certbot_dns_infomaniak.dns_infomaniak_test.APIDomainTest testMethod=test_del_txt_record>
def test_del_txt_record(self): """del_txt_record with normal params should succeed""" > self._register_response( "/1/product?service_name=domain&customer_name={domain}".format(domain=DOMAIN), data=[ { "id": "654321", "account_id": "1234", "service_id": "14", "service_name": "domain", "customer_name": DOMAIN, } ], )
certbot_dns_infomaniak/dns_infomaniak_test.py:180: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ certbot_dns_infomaniak/dns_infomaniak_test.py:103: in _register_response self._mock_request(url, resp, method) _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = <certbot_dns_infomaniak.dns_infomaniak_test.APIDomainTest testMethod=test_del_txt_record> url = '/1/product?service_name=domain&customer_name=example.com' response = {'data': [{'account_id': '1234', 'customer_name': 'example.com', 'id': '654321', 'service_id': '14', ...}], 'result': 'success'} method = 'GET'
def _mock_request(self, url, response, method): """Mock the request using pycurl""" buffer = BytesIO() c = pycurl.Curl() c.setopt(c.URL, self.client.baseUrl + url) c.setopt(c.WRITEFUNCTION, buffer.write) c.setopt(c.HTTPHEADER, ['Authorization: Bearer ' + FAKE_TOKEN])
if method == 'POST': c.setopt(c.POSTFIELDS, response) c.setopt(c.CUSTOMREQUEST, 'POST') elif method == 'DELETE': c.setopt(c.CUSTOMREQUEST, 'DELETE')
> c.perform() E pycurl.error: (1, 'Protocol "mock" not supported')
certbot_dns_infomaniak/dns_infomaniak_test.py:129: error
